# Imperial Mercenaries

#### Assassinorum Mercenaries

All are unavailable to Officio Assassinorum.  
**Max 1 per Warband:**

* 0-1 Adamus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Callidus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Culexus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Eversor Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Vanus Infocyte (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Venenum Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Vindicare Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)

#### Ecclesiarchy Mercenaries

All are unavailable to Adeptus Mechanicus and Necromunda Gang (Ironhead Squat Prospectors)  
**Max 2 per Warband besides Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Ministorum, or Inquisition:**

* 0-2 Arco-Flagellant (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Death Cult Assassin (Cost: 4 Glory) Unavailable to Adeptus Ministorum  
* 0-1 Dialogus (Cost: 4 Glory) Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Ministorum (Ecclesiastic Militant Force), or Inquisition (Ordo: Hereticus) Only  
* 0-1 Hospitaller (Cost: 3 Glory) Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Ministorum (Ecclesiastic Militant Force), or Inquisition (Ordo: Hereticus) Only  
* 0-1 Ministorum Priest (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Adeptus Ministorum  
* 0-1 Ministorum Vindictor (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Adeptus Ministorum  
* 0-1 Questkeeper (Cost: 4 Glory) Inquisition Only  
* 0-1 Saint Celestine (Cost: 8 Glory) Adepta Sororitas Only  
* 0-1 Salvationist (Cost: 2 Glory)

#### Law Mercenaries

* 0-1 Arbites Enforcer (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Necromunda Gang (Palanite Enforcers) and Inquisition (Ordo: Minoris)  
* 0-1 Hardcase Cyber Mastiff (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Necromunda Gang (House Orlock or Palanite Enforcers) and Inquisition (Ordo: Minoris)  
* 0-1 Sister of Silence (Cost: 4 Glory) Unavailable to Adeptus Custodes, Adeptus Mechanicus, Necromunda Gang (House Dalaque), or Ironhead Squat Prospectors Warband, or Warband led by PSYKER

#### Mars Mercenaries

* 0-1 Autosavant (Cost: 3 Glory) Adeptus Mechanicus, Adeptus Ministorum, Inquisition, or Rogue Trader Only  
* 0-1 Combat Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Adeptus Mechanicus  
* 0-1 Gun Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Adeptus Mechanicus  
* 0-1 Magos Errant (Cost: 4 Glory) Unavailable to Adeptus Astartes, Adeptus Mechanicus, and Adeptus Ministorum  
* 0-1 Medicae Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory) Adeptus Mechanicus Only  
* 0-1 Sydonian Skatros (Cost: 4 Glory) Adeptus Mechanicus (non Data-Psalm Conclave) Only

#### Military Mercenaries

* 0-1 Canid Officer (Cost: 2 Glory) Astra Militarum Only  
* 0-1 Deathworld Veteran (Cost: 4 Glory) Unavailable to Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Astartes, Adeptus Custodes  
* 0-1 Penal Legionnaire (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Astartes, Adeptus Custodes  
* 0-1 Ratling Sniper (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Astartes, Adeptus Custodes, Astra Militarum  
* 0-1 Ratling Tankstopper (Cost: 4 Glory) Astra Militarum, Inquisition, or Rogue Trader Only

#### Space Marine Mercenaries

* 0-1 Lone Primaris Marine (Cost: 4 Glory) Unavailable to Adeptus Astartes  
* 0-1 Primaris Minelayer (Cost: 5 Glory) Adeptus Astartes Only  
* 0-1 Techmarine (Cost: 5 Glory) Adeptus Astartes or Adeptus Mechanicus Only

**Max 1 per Warband:**

* 0-1 Black Templar Crusader (Cost: 5 Glory) Unavailable to Adeptus Astartes (Black Templars), Adeptus Mechanicus, Necromunda Gang (Ironhead Squad Prospectors)  
* 0-1 Blood Angels Sanguinary Guard (Cost: 6 Glory) Unavailable to Adeptus Astartes (Blood Angels)  
* 0-1 Dark Angel Knight (Cost: 5 Glory) Unavailable to Adeptus Astartes (Dark Angels), Adeptus Mechanicus, Necromunda Gang (Ironhead Squad Prospectors)  
* 0-1 Deathwatch Veteran (Cost: 5 Glory) Adeptus Astartes (non-Deathwatch) Only  
* 0-1 Grey Knight Paladin (Cost: 6 Glory) Unavailable to Adeptus Astartes (Grey Knights)  
* 0-1 Imperial Fist Heavy Gunner (Cost: 5 Glory) Unavailable to Adeptus Astartes (Imperial Fists)  
* 0-1 Iron Hands Heavy Gunner (Cost: 5 Glory) Unavailable to Adeptus Astartes (Iron Hands)  
* 0-1 Raven Guard Corvus Marine (Cost: 5 Glory) Unavailable to Adeptus Astartes (Raven Guard)  
* 0-1 Space Wolves Wulfen (Cost: 6 Glory) Unavailable to Adeptus Astartes (Space Wolves)  
* 0-1 White Scars Outrider (Cost: 6 Glory) Unavailable to Adeptus Astartes (White Scars)

#### Other Imperial Mercenaries

* 0-1 Astropath (Cost: 2 Glory) Unavailable to Adepta Sororitas  
* 0-1 Canid Companion (Cost: 2 Glory) Unavailable to Astra Militarum  
* 0-1 Lone Inquisitor (Cost: 6 Glory) Unavailable to Inquisition  
* 0-1 Navigator (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Rogue Trader  
* 0-1 Ogryn Bodyguard (Cost: 5 Glory) Unavailable to Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Astartes, Adeptus Custodes, Astra Militarum  
* 0-1 Rejuvenat Adept (Cost: 2 Glory) Unavailable to Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Astartes, Adeptus Custodes  
* 0-1 Sanctioned Psyker (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Astartes, or Adeptus Custodes
